name: blackboard
description: Unified tool for interacting with the shared blackboard (read, write, lock, release).

key.description: The unique key (filename) for the data or lock.

action.description: The action to perform on the blackboard.

content.description: The data to write (used with action='write'). Can be a string or a JSON object.

timeout.description: Timeout in seconds for 'lock' action. Defaults to 10.
